query: how many work orders did we complete last quarter?
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-work-orders with maximo-overview as parent
Surfaces the COMP-vs-CLOSE ambiguity before answering: confirms whether 'completed' means COMP (physical work done) or CLOSE (finalized), defaulting to COMP-or-later
Flags that closed WOs may be filtered out via HISTORYFLAG=0 and confirms they are present in the data
Filters WOCLASS='WORKORDER' and ISTASK=0, scopes the window on ACTFINISH
